nodes.name: .dockerignore
nodes.summary: Docker build context exclusion list that keeps the image lean by omitting virtual environments, caches, version control metadata, IDE files, and secrets from the build context.

nodes.name: Dockerfile
nodes.summary: Single-stage Docker image built on python:alpine that installs Python dependencies, copies the application into /app, creates a non-root user for security, and starts the FusionAL FastAPI gateway via uvicorn on port 8009.
nodes.languageNotes: Runs as a non-root appuser (UID 5678) for least-privilege execution; exposes port 8009 matching FusionAL's default gateway port.
